# Web cache: statistics in genetics Mendel laws probability inheritance

> 时间: 2026-03-07 14:48


## 1. 
- 来源: duckduckgo

The rules of probability can be applied to Mendelian crosses to determine the expected phenotypes and genotypes of offspring. By examining sample sizes, Mendel showed that his crosses behaved reproducibly according to the laws of probability , and that the traits were inherited as independent events.
